headline: Impinj: A 30+% Rally This Year, But 0% Revenue Growth YOY; Something Doesn't Add Up
summary: Impinj reported flat Q1 2026 revenues of $74.25M, down 0.04% YoY, and missed EPS expectations by $0.01. Learn more about PI stock here.

headline: Skyworks Exchange Offers And AGM Votes Shape Qorvo Deal Outlook
summary: Skyworks Solutions (NasdaqGS:SWKS) has launched exchange offers for certain Qorvo debt securities, tied to the anticipated acquisition of Qorvo. The exchange offers are connected to the merger closing and aim to shift Qorvo noteholders into new securities linked to the combined company. At the recent annual general meeting, Skyworks shareholders voted against proposed changes to company governance. Shareholders also rejected resolutions related to expanded greenhouse gas emissions reporting...
